content: Brain Twin summary for patient John Smith, born January 15, 1980. Contact: john.smith@email.com, phone 555-123-4567. For clinical decision support only. Not a substitute for professional judgment. Confidence level is moderate.

sections.body: Subject hash: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1d2e3f4a5b6c7d8e9f0a1b2. However the patient name John Smith appears in the raw data.
Baseline neurophysiological metrics for patient John Smith: Peak alpha 9.8 Hz. Frontal theta/beta ratio 3.2 (elevated).
Key findings for Mr. Smith include elevated frontal theta and reduced alpha coherence consistent with attention-related profiles. His date of birth January 15, 1980 was used for normative comparison.
Confidence tier: moderate. Based on adequate data quality and supporting citations.
For clinical decision support only. Not a substitute for professional judgment.
Data from 19-channel qEEG recording performed at City Hospital for patient John Smith (MRN: 12345678).
